content:
Your previous 'host-binding' rewrite was REJECTED before testing:
- anti-gaming lint: hardcodes test-repo slug 'sveltejs/kit'; references test-org name 'sveltejs'; references test-org name 'remix-run'

Return the COMPLETE corrected module in ONE ```javascript code block. No prose. Never hardcode repo/owner names or compare context.owner/context.repo to string literals.
